title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CRISIL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CRISIL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!
